scenarios.name: decision.json schema validation for 2026-04-26
scenarios.description: Validates the served Husk Walker decision artifact and internal day-detail links.

scenarios.name: Husk Walker texture and plate assets load from the manifest
scenarios.description: Verifies the Husk Walker body and plate decal are manifest-backed textures, not procedural fallbacks.

scenarios.name: Tutorial rolls into Crackplate challenge and gates endless
scenarios.description: Checks tutorial teaching, automatic challenge handoff, and endless unlock only after challenge clear.

scenarios.name: Board Scout panel reveals Husk Walker card with armor/windup detail
scenarios.description: The card renders with armor and windup detail, keyboard focus, and stable card layout.

scenarios.name: Game inventory and Board Scout keyboard accessibility on day-26 board
scenarios.description: Verifies skip link, tab order, inventory ARIA state, Board Scout traversal, live regions, and ARIA hygiene.

scenarios.name: Scenario difficulty validator passes for Crackplate
scenarios.description: Runs the deterministic validator for 2026-04-26 and confirms a narrow one-breach clear, no naive wins, Cottonburr arc usage, and full endless grace follow-through.
